recommendations.title: The Snow Queen 2: Refreeze
recommendations.overview: After the trolls' victory over the Snow Queen, Orm claims that he is destined to marry the princess and inherit great power.

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: Epic Tails
recommendations.overview: An adventurous mouse sets off to battle dangerous creatures in Ancient Greece, including Poseidon.

recommendations.title: Dreambuilders
recommendations.overview: Minna, a young girl, misuses her newfound ability to create and control other people’s dreams to teach her bothersome stepsister a lesson. When her stepsister can no longer wake up, Minna has to enter the dream world to save her.

recommendations.title: Onoda: 10,000 Nights in the Jungle

recommendations.title: Condorito: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Condorito must find a way to rescue his mother in law from an ancient race of aliens which wants to enslave the universe once again.

recommendations.title: LEGO Batman: The Movie - DC Super Heroes Unite
recommendations.overview: Joker teams up with Lex Luthor to destroy the world one brick at a time. It's up to Batman, Superman and the rest of the Justice League to stop them.

recommendations.title: Brother Bear

recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham
